requirements.evidence: `LSContentCard` uses `LSCard` and the expected typography variants in `android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSContentCard.kt:49-75`, but the required verification method `default_render_uses_surface_card_tokens` does not exist; `LSContentCardTest.kt` only defines `default_render_uses_lscard_and_theme_tokens` at line 12 and relies on source-text inspection.
requirements.remediation: Rename/add the required contract test method and replace source-string assertions with behavior/semantics assertions against the composed UI.

requirements.evidence: Optional `header`/`actions` slots exist in `LSContentCard.kt:38-42,57-89`, but the required test `header_and_actions_slots_compose_correctly` is missing; `LSContentCardTest.kt` only has `header_and_actions_slots_are_optional_without_reserved_gap` at line 28 and does not verify rendered layout behavior.
requirements.remediation: Add the exact contract test name and assert actual composition order/gaps in Compose, not file contents.

requirements.evidence: `LSListRow` hardcodes `LSListRowMinHeight = 44.dp` (`LSListRow.kt:56`), uses `padding(horizontal = theme.space.lg, vertical = theme.space.xs)` and `Arrangement.spacedBy(theme.space.sm)` (`LSListRow.kt:87-88`), and renders subtitle with `TypographyVariant.Ui.Label.Sm` (`LSListRow.kt:102-106`). The contract requires `theme.sizing.touchTarget` / 48dp, leading-title gap `spacing.3`, vertical padding `spacing.2`, and subtitle `typography.ui.body.md`.
requirements.remediation: Use the task-specified touch-target and spacing tokens, and render subtitle with `TypographyVariant.Ui.Body.Md`.

requirements.evidence: The caller `modifier` is applied to the outer `Column` (`LSListRow.kt:70`), while click semantics are attached to the inner `Row` (`LSListRow.kt:71-82`). In `LSListRowUiTest.kt:34-39`, the test tags and clicks the outer node, so the required interaction path is not actually exercised and would fail on device. The required test name `tap_callback_fires_once_non_tap_row_has_no_indication` is also absent.
requirements.remediation: Apply the public `modifier` to the interactive root node, keep click semantics on that same root, and add the exact contract test covering one-tap behavior plus non-interactive role/indication assertions.

requirements.evidence: `grep -n 'Color(0xFF' ... | wc -l` returned `0`, and `grep -n 'Text(' ... | wc -l` returned `0` for both molecule files.
Story id count across `LSContentCardStory.kt` and `LSListRowStory.kt` is `10`.

findings.evidence: The implementation does not match the required token contract: 44.dp min height, `space.lg/xs/sm` layout, and subtitle `Ui.Label.Sm` instead of the specified touch-target/spacing/body-md values.
findings.fix: Replace the fallback dimensions with the task-specified touch-target and spacing tokens, and render the subtitle with `TypographyVariant.Ui.Body.Md`.

findings.evidence: `modifier`/`testTag` land on the outer `Column`, but the click action is on the inner `Row`. The UI test clicks the tagged outer node, so the interactive contract is not actually tested and external callers cannot target the clickable root reliably.
findings.fix: Make the clickable element the public root and apply the caller `modifier` to that same node.

findings.evidence: The required contract test names are missing, and the unit tests mostly inspect source files as strings rather than composed behavior. That allowed AC-3 regressions to coexist with passing unit tests.
findings.fix: Add the exact required test methods and rewrite the tests to render the composables and assert semantics/layout behavior instead of source-text presence.

findings.evidence: The new style/slot data classes are not annotated with `@Stable` or `@Immutable`, despite the task contract explicitly requiring stability annotations for slot props.
findings.fix: Annotate the new immutable/stable models appropriately and keep the slot model surface stability-explicit.

findings.evidence: The molecule styling bypasses the existing `resolveLSCardStyle(LocalLaneShadowTheme.current)` pattern and hardwires `GeneratedTokens` directly for several visual properties, contrary to the task’s requirement to resolve through `LocalLaneShadowTheme.current`.
findings.fix: Mirror the existing resolver pattern by accepting theme values and resolving colors/sizing from `LocalLaneShadowTheme.current`.

summary: NEEDS_FIXES. AC-3 and AC-4 are broken in the implementation, and AC-1/AC-2 are not contract-complete because the required verification tests are missing and current tests are mostly source-string checks. AC-5 and AC-6 pass by grep/story count. Mandatory Gradle reruns in this review session were blocked by sandbox file-permission errors on Gradle wrapper lock files, but the verdict does not depend on that environment issue.
